title: JOB AND CAREER HELP - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY COOPERATIVE LIBRARY SERVICES JOB AND CAREER HELP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with job searching (online job coaching, practice interviewing, and feedback on resume), information on starting and operating a small bussiness, and online video courses taught by industry experts. Confidential Address Eligibility: Washington County library card holder Hours: All other services: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Job coaches: 7 days per week 1pm-10pm, closed holidays Email Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Business Development Prejob Guidance Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - BRAINFUSE HELPNOW EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MANGO LANGUAGES INFORMATION SERVICES - LIBRARY MAIL SERVICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY COOPERATIVE LIBRARY SERVICES
